sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18121" key="a)fammati/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφαμμᾰτ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n18121.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fasten off,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:24:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.24.4</biblScope> </bibl>:—hence <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφαμμᾰτ-ιστέον</orth>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:56" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.56</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
